# Feature Request: Migrate the CLI from manual os.Args parsing to cobra for cleaner flag handling, auto-generated help, and built-in shell completion (bash, zsh, fish, powershell). All 10 commands (add, new, open, sync, stack, delete, list, archive, init) plus global flags (--version, --help) need migration.

**Slug**: `cobra-migration`
**Created**: 2026-05-04T06:22:55Z

## Description

Migrate the CLI from manual os.Args parsing to cobra for cleaner flag handling, auto-generated help, and built-in shell completion (bash, zsh, fish, powershell). All 10 commands (add, new, open, sync, stack, delete, list, archive, init) plus global flags (--version, --help) need migration.
